name: White Chocolate Candy Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1 Put hot tap water in a double boiler and melt chocolate until it is smooth.
2 Remove the hot water and replace with cold water in the bottom of the double boiler. Stir the chocolate until it thickens.
3 Remove the cold water and add hot tap water again. When the chocolate becomes thin, drop the pretzels into it until they are completely coated.
4 Remove the pretzels from the chocolate and place them on waxed paper to cool.
5 Once cooled, put them in a plastic bag.
